Verified from Alabama Baseball Camps/Ryzer. Starts 1:30pm July 12; ends early afternoon July 14. Limited to 40 campers. Includes dorm housing, meals, pro-style workout, skill instruction, scrimmages, NCAA/recruiting sessions, optional metrics/evaluation add-ons. Questions: bamabaseball@ia.ua.edu

eligibility: 7th–JUCO; boys grades 7–12 plus transfers/JUCO; includes grades 9–12
notes: Verified from Alabama Baseball Camps/Ryzer. Check-in 8:30am; departure 3:00pm. Day 1 includes position-specific instruction/evaluation; Day 2 includes live gameplay, campus tour, and recruiting talk. Lunch is not provided. Optional metrics/evaluation add-ons available. Questions: bamabaseball@ia.ua.edu

cost: Pitcher Only: $140; Position Player Only: $190; Position Player/Pitcher: $217

Exposure to South Alabama staff and up to 20 other college coaches; check-in 30 minutes before session. Required camp medical/waiver forms. Contacts: Corley Reynolds (228-218-3624), Joey Jones (205-249-2031), baseballcamps@southalabama.edu.
